feedback.text: Dear Commission, please do your best to help customers gain some protection against video game publishers destroyingor revoking access to games that the customers have purchased (or have purchased licenses for). Many, many citizens of the EU, my own person included have purchased quite pricey video games or microtransactions for games on digital platforms and it cannot stand that publishers get away with taking from us what we have purchased from them. Respectfully Marc Melchert
